# DemoQA Practice Form Automation using Selenium

## Project Description
This project automates the DemoQA Practice Form using Selenium WebDriver in Java.

## Website Used
https://demoqa.com/automation-practice-form

## Tools and Technologies
- Java
- Selenium WebDriver
- ChromeDriver
- Eclipse / IntelliJ IDEA

## Features Automated
- Enter First Name
- Enter Last Name
- Enter Email
- Select Gender
- Enter Mobile Number
- Select Date of Birth
- Enter Subject
- Select Hobby
- Enter Current Address
- Select State
- Select City
- Click Submit button

## Purpose
This project is created for practicing web form automation and Selenium testing.

Aarthi Murali
